contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:15.467
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Key Frames

- 00:10.600 ![](keyFrame.10600.jpg)

- 00:14.833 ![](keyFrame.14833.jpg)
- 00:15.467 ![](keyFrame.15467.jpg)

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a collaboration announcement between Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI, showcasing a small plane flying over a tropical island. The narration begins with a discussion about the importance of high-quality data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, mentioning the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include waveform audio representations and shots of a data center and server farms, emphasizing the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

Summary.valueString: The video transitions to scenic aerial views from the Flight Simulator, showing a red biplane flying over coastal landscapes and a castle surrounded by greenery. The narration highlights the high fidelity and human-like quality of the cognitive services' voice offerings. The visuals emphasize the realism and immersive experience of the flight simulation environment.

contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:23.100 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and a small plane flying over it, introducing a collaboration between Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI. It then transitions to a discussion about neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, emphasizing the importance of high-quality data. The speaker explains the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include sound waveforms and shots of data centers, highlighting the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model. The segment concludes with a statement about the high fidelity of cognitive services and their human-like voice quality, followed by a simulated air traffic control communication between an aircraft and ground control, showcasing the application of the TTS technology in aviation simulation.

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and a small plane flying over it, introducing a collaboration between Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI. It then transitions to a discussion about neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, emphasizing the importance of high-quality data. The speaker explains the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include sound waveforms and shots of data centers, highlighting the technology's infrastructure. The segment concludes with a demonstration of the TTS's high fidelity, featuring realistic airport ground control communications and detailed visuals of airplanes and airport staff, underscoring the human-like quality of the synthesized voices.
